hero.title:
Aangelina AI: The WhatsApp AI agent that
automates your
hero.subtitle: Revolutionize your restaurant management. Automate your orders, manage your inventory, handle complaints and coordinate deliveries with our intelligent AI agent specialized for restaurants

statusHero.title: Stop Wasting Mental Energy on
statusHero.subtitle: Your brain wasn't built for repetitive, mundane tasks. Automate your daily WhatsApp statuses, eliminate the anxiety of "forgetting to post," and reclaim your ultimate focus.

statusNeuro.title: The Hidden Cost of
statusNeuro.subtitle: Science tells us that relying on your memory to complete recurring administrative tasks drains your cognitive battery and limits your business potential.

zeigarnik.title: The Zeigarnik Effect
zeigarnik.description: Every time you remember "I need to post a status," your brain creates a loop of low-level anxiety. Unfinished tasks constantly occupy valuable mental space until they are completed.

decision.title: Decision Fatigue
decision.description: Interrupting an important creative workflow just to open your phone, select an image, and type a caption burns immediate willpower, meaning worse decisions later in the day.

inconsistency.title: Inconsistency Loss
inconsistency.description: Because your brain subconsciously avoids mundane chores, you end up posting sporadically. This breaks the habit with your audience and directly hurts your daily revenue.

statusFeatures.title: Design Your Week,
statusFeatures.subtitle: Psychology shows that offloading tasks to a trusted system instantly reduces stress. Spend 5 minutes on Monday scheduling your pipeline, and enjoy the peace of mind.

precision.title: One-Time Precision
precision.description: Launch a specific promotion exactly when it matters without picking up your phone. Schedule at 2:00 PM on Friday? Consider it done.

recurring.title: Set It & Forget It (Recurring)
recurring.description: Got a 'Motivation Monday' or 'Flash Sale Friday'? Set the frequency array once, and our engine will loop your beautiful content automatically every week.

media.title: Rich Media Native
media.description: Images? Videos? Text captions? Upload them seamlessly. Our Evolution API integration perfectly formats your media into native WhatsApp statuses.

background.title: Instant Background Execution
background.description: Zero overlap crashes and zero delays. Our robust polling engine runs in the absolute background while you focus on sealing deals with customers.

analytics.title: Status & Account Dashboard
analytics.description: Monitor all your scheduled and published statuses in one place. Track posting history, manage your WhatsApp connection status, and keep full control of your account from a clean central dashboard.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Bank-level encryption and secure API connections ensure your content and data are always protected.

statusCTA.title: Reclaim
statusCTA.subtitle: True freedom isn't just about having more time; it's about having more peace. Stop serving the algorithm manually and start letting Aangelina AI do the heavy lifting.

features.title: Powerful Features for
features.subtitle: Everything you need to streamline your restaurant operations and provide exceptional customer service through WhatsApp.
features.comingSoon: And many more features coming soon...

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your restaurant

orders.question: How does the agent handle orders?
orders.answer: Aangelina AI presents your menu, takes orders via numbers, automatically checks stock and sends digital invoices.

stocks.question: How does inventory management work?
stocks.answer: The agent checks your stock in real-time via Excel or API, suggests alternatives when out of stock and automatically updates after each order.

complaints.question: What happens with customer complaints?
complaints.answer: The agent analyzes problems, proposes automatic solutions (refund, discount) and escalates to manager for complex cases.

marketplace.question: What is Marketplace Mode?
marketplace.answer: Marketplace mode allows the main Aangelina AI assistant to manage all restaurant agents to help customers view, discuss and order from any restaurant.

amadou.name: Amadou Fall
amadou.content: Aangelina AI revolutionized our customer service. Orders are taken automatically, no more lost customers! Our sales increased by 45%.

fatou.name: Fatou Diallo
fatou.content: Inventory management is now automatic. The agent suggests alternatives when a dish is no longer available. Our customers love it!

jean.name: Jean-Baptiste Koffi
jean.content: Complaints are handled instantly. The agent proposes solutions and only bothers us for really important cases. Perfect!

marie.name: Marie Agbessi
marie.content: Aangelina AI coordinates our deliveries according to urgency and location. No more delays, no more unhappy customers!

kossi.name: Kossi Togbe
kossi.content: The agent informs us in real-time about available stock and allows quick addition of new products. Huge time saver!

grace.name: Grace Lawson
grace.content: Our customers receive notifications at every step: preparation, kitchen exit, delivery. The customer experience is exceptional!

configure.title: Configure Aangelina AI
configure.description: Restaurant configures Aangelina AI by providing restaurant details: menu, hours, location, and preferences in just a few minutes

generate.title: Agent generated with link & QR code
generate.description: Your personalized AI agent is automatically generated and you receive a unique link and QR code to share with your customers

deploy.title: Use in restaurant & share with clients
deploy.description: Deploy the agent in your restaurant and share the link/QR code with your clients to start receiving orders immediately

marketplace.title: Join the Marketplace Mode
marketplace.description: Your Aangelina AI agent is added to the agents network where the main Aangelina AI assistant manages all restaurant agents to help end users view, discuss, and order from any restaurant

enterprise.title: Enterprise Ready!
enterprise.subtitle: Security and compliance for your business

privacy.title: Guaranteed Privacy
privacy.description: Your data is protected and encrypted

compliance.title: Global Compliance
compliance.description: Respect for GDPR and international regulations

footer.tagline: The AI agent that turns your WhatsApp into a sales assistant. Automate your sales and boost your revenue.

intro.title: 1. Introduction & Scope
intro.content: Aangelina AI, operated by Dev Merryck Studio ('we', 'us', or 'our'), is committed to safeguarding your privacy and maintaining the highest standards of data protection. This Privacy Policy constitutes a legally binding agreement that governs the collection, processing, storage, and disclosure of personal information when you access or use our WhatsApp Business automation platform (the 'Platform'). By creating an account or connecting your WhatsApp Business account to our services, you expressly acknowledge that you have read, understood, and consent to the practices described herein. This Policy applies to all users, including business owners, authorized personnel, and administrators who interact with our Platform. We process data in accordance with applicable data protection regulations, including but not limited to the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), and relevant West African data protection frameworks.

dataCollection.title: 2. Categories of Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect and process several categories of information to deliver our services effectively: (a) Account & Identity Data: Full name, business name, email address, phone number, business registration details, tax identification numbers where applicable, and authentication credentials; (b) WhatsApp Business Integration Data: WhatsApp Business account phone number, connection tokens, instance identifiers, and technical metadata required for API communication (we do not access or store your WhatsApp message content or contact lists beyond operational necessity); (c) Content & Media Data: Status images, videos, captions, scheduling parameters, posting frequency configurations, and media metadata you upload for automated distribution; (d) Product & Inventory Data: Product catalogs, pricing information, stock levels, and business operational data you configure within the Platform; (e) Usage & Analytics Data: Feature utilization patterns, status posting history, login timestamps, session duration, interaction logs, and performance metrics; (f) Technical & Device Data: IP addresses, browser type and version, device identifiers, operating system, referring URLs, and access logs for security and diagnostic purposes; (g) Payment & Billing Data: Billing address, transaction history, subscription tier, and payment method information processed through our certified payment partner FedaPay (we do not store complete payment card numbers or sensitive financial credentials on our servers); (h) Communications Data: Support tickets, feedback submissions, and correspondence with our team. We collect this information through direct input, automated technologies, and third-party integrations.

dataUsage.title: 3. Legal Basis & Purposes of Processing
dataUsage.content: We process your personal information based on the following legal grounds and for the specified purposes: (a) Contractual Necessity: To fulfill our obligations under the Terms of Service, including account creation, WhatsApp Business integration, automated status posting, subscription management, and service delivery; (b) Legitimate Interests: To improve Platform functionality, conduct analytics, prevent fraud and abuse, ensure system security, optimize user experience, and maintain business operations (we balance these interests against your privacy rights); (c) Legal Compliance: To comply with applicable laws, regulations, tax obligations, accounting requirements, and respond to lawful requests from authorities; (d) Consent: Where required by law, we obtain your explicit consent for specific processing activities, such as marketing communications or optional features. You may withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before withdrawal. Specific purposes include: providing core automation services, processing payments and managing billing cycles, sending transactional notifications and service updates, delivering customer support and technical assistance, detecting and preventing fraudulent activities, improving Platform features through aggregated analytics, ensuring compliance with WhatsApp Business policies, and maintaining audit trails for security purposes. We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for their marketing purposes.

whatsappData.title: 4. WhatsApp Business Integration & Data Handling
whatsappData.content: Our Platform requires integration with your WhatsApp Business account to deliver automated status posting services. When you authorize this connection, we access only the minimum permissions necessary to execute your scheduled tasks. Specifically: (a) Scope of Access: We obtain technical credentials to post status updates on your behalf, verify account connectivity, and monitor posting success rates. We do not access, read, store, or process your private or group chat messages, customer conversations, or contact lists beyond what is strictly necessary for service operation; (b) Zero-Storage Policy for Conversations: We maintain a strict zero-storage policy for conversational data. Your WhatsApp messages are never logged, archived, or used for any purpose including AI training, content generation, or analytics; (c) Transient Processing: Status content you upload is processed in volatile memory during the posting operation and is not retained on our permanent infrastructure beyond the retention period specified in Section 6; (d) Connection Control: You maintain full control over the WhatsApp integration and may disconnect your account at any time through your dashboard settings. Upon disconnection, all active tokens and access credentials are immediately revoked and purged from our systems; (e) Compliance with WhatsApp Policies: We operate in strict accordance with WhatsApp Business Solution policies and Meta's terms of service. You are responsible for ensuring your use of automated status posting complies with these policies.

dataSecurity.title: 5. Security Measures & Data Protection
dataSecurity.content: We implement comprehensive, industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction: (a) Encryption: All data transmission between your device and our servers is protected by TLS/SSL encryption (minimum TLS 1.2). Sensitive data at rest, including WhatsApp connection credentials, is encrypted using AES-256 encryption standards; (b) Infrastructure Security: We utilize Supabase's enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure with built-in security features including network isolation, DDoS protection, and regular security patches. Our database employs row-level security policies and role-based access controls; (c) Access Controls: Access to personal data is restricted to authorized personnel on a need-to-know basis. All team members with data access undergo security training and are bound by confidentiality obligations; (d) Authentication & Authorization: We enforce strong password requirements, support multi-factor authentication, and implement session management with automatic timeout mechanisms; (e) Security Monitoring: We maintain continuous monitoring systems to detect suspicious activities, unauthorized access attempts, and potential security incidents. Automated alerts enable rapid response to threats; (f) Regular Audits: We conduct periodic security assessments, vulnerability scans, and penetration testing to identify and remediate potential weaknesses; (g) Secure Payment Processing: All payment transactions are processed through PCI-DSS compliant payment partners. We do not store complete payment card numbers on our servers; (h) Incident Response: We maintain a documented incident response plan to address potential data breaches promptly and in accordance with applicable notification requirements. While we implement robust security measures, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security but commit to maintaining reasonable and appropriate safeguards.

dataRetention.title: 6. Data Retention & Deletion
dataRetention.content: We retain personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements: (a) Active Account Data: Account information, business profiles, and configuration settings are retained for the duration of your active subscription and for 30 days following account closure to facilitate potential reactivation; (b) Status Content: Uploaded media files, captions, and scheduling configurations are retained for 90 days after the scheduled posting date to enable performance tracking and troubleshooting. After this period, content is automatically purged from our systems; (c) Transaction Records: Payment history, invoices, and billing information are retained for 7 years to comply with tax regulations, accounting standards, and financial audit requirements in applicable jurisdictions; (d) Usage Analytics: Aggregated and anonymized usage statistics may be retained indefinitely for product improvement and business intelligence purposes. These datasets cannot be used to identify individual users; (e) Legal Hold: In cases of pending litigation, regulatory investigations, or legal disputes, we may retain relevant data beyond standard retention periods as required by law or legal counsel; (f) Account Deletion: Upon account deletion, we initiate a 30-day grace period during which you may recover your account. After this period, we permanently delete all personal information except data we are legally required to retain. Deletion is irreversible and includes: account credentials, business profiles, uploaded content, usage history, and WhatsApp connection data; (g) Backup Systems: Deleted data may persist in encrypted backup systems for up to 90 days before complete removal. These backups are inaccessible for operational purposes and are maintained solely for disaster recovery.

userRights.title: 7. Your Privacy Rights & How to Exercise Them
userRights.content: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights regarding your personal information. We are committed to facilitating the exercise of these rights in accordance with applicable law: (a) Right of Access: You may request confirmation of whether we process your personal data and obtain a copy of such data. We will provide this information in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format; (b) Right to Rectification: You may request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal information. Most account information can be updated directly through your dashboard settings; (c) Right to Erasure ('Right to be Forgotten'): You may request deletion of your personal data when it is no longer necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, you withdraw consent, you object to processing, or the data was unlawfully processed. This right is subject to legal retention obligations; (d) Right to Data Portability: You may request to receive your personal data in a structured, machine-readable format and have it transmitted to another controller where technically feasible; (e) Right to Restriction of Processing: You may request that we limit the processing of your personal data in certain circumstances, such as when you contest the accuracy of the data or object to processing; (f) Right to Object: You may object to processing based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing purposes. We will cease processing unless we demonstrate compelling legitimate grounds that override your interests; (g) Right to Withdraw Consent: Where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw that consent at any time. Withdrawal does not affect the lawfulness of processing prior to withdrawal; (h) Right to Lodge a Complaint: You have the right to file a complaint with your local data protection authority if you believe we have violated your privacy rights. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@angelina-ai.com or through the privacy settings in your dashboard. We will respond to all requests within 30 days (or as required by applicable law). We may require identity verification to prevent unauthorized access to your personal information.

thirdParty.title: 8. Third-Party Service Providers & Data Sharing
thirdParty.content: We engage carefully vetted third-party service providers to support our operations. These partners are contractually obligated to protect your data and use it only for specified purposes: (a) Infrastructure & Hosting: Supabase (database, authentication, and storage services) - processes account data, business information, and uploaded content under strict data processing agreements compliant with GDPR and international standards; (b) Payment Processing: FedaPay (payment gateway for West African markets) - processes billing information, transaction data, and payment credentials. FedaPay is PCI-DSS compliant and maintains independent privacy policies; (c) WhatsApp Business API: We interface with WhatsApp's official Business API infrastructure to deliver status posting functionality. This integration is governed by Meta's data processing terms; (d) Analytics & Monitoring: We use privacy-focused analytics tools to understand Platform usage patterns and improve service quality. These tools process anonymized or pseudonymized data where possible; (e) Customer Support: Support ticket systems may process communications data to deliver assistance. Support personnel access only information necessary to resolve your inquiries; (f) Email Communications: Transactional email service providers deliver account notifications, password resets, and service updates. We do not share your email address for marketing purposes without consent. We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. Data sharing occurs only: (i) with your explicit consent, (ii) to fulfill contractual obligations, (iii) to comply with legal requirements, (iv) to protect our rights and prevent fraud, or (v) in connection with a business transfer (merger, acquisition, or asset sale), subject to confidentiality obligations. All third-party processors are required to maintain security standards equivalent to those described in this Policy.

contact.title: 9. Contact Information & Policy Updates
contact.content: For questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us through the following channels: Email: privacy@angelina-ai.com (monitored daily, responses within 48 hours for general inquiries, 30 days for formal rights requests); Dashboard: Access privacy settings and data management tools through your account dashboard; Postal Address: Dev Merryck Studio, [Business Address] (for formal legal correspondence). We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices, legal requirements, or service offerings. Material changes will be communicated through: (a) prominent notice on the Platform, (b) email notification to your registered address, and (c) updated 'Last Updated' date at the top of this Policy. Continued use of the Platform after policy updates constitutes acceptance of the revised terms. We encourage you to review this Policy regularly to stay informed about how we protect your information. For users in the European Economic Area (EEA), United Kingdom, or Switzerland: Dev Merryck Studio serves as the data controller for personal information processed through the Platform. For users in other jurisdictions: Applicable data protection laws and your specific rights may vary. Please contact us to understand how local regulations apply to your data.

intro.title: 1. Acceptance & Binding Agreement
intro.content: These Terms and Conditions ('Terms', 'Agreement') constitute a legally binding contract between you ('User', 'you', 'your', or 'Subscriber') and Dev Merryck Studio ('Company', 'we', 'us', or 'our'), governing your access to and use of the Aangelina AI Platform ('Platform', 'Service'). By creating an account, connecting a WhatsApp Business account, or otherwise accessing the Platform, you expressly acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms, our Privacy Policy, and all applicable laws and regulations. If you are entering into this Agreement on behalf of a business entity, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that entity to these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms in their entirety, you must immediately cease all use of the Platform and may not create an account. These Terms apply to all users, including free tier users, paid subscribers, trial users, and administrators. Your continued use of the Platform following any modifications to these Terms constitutes acceptance of such changes.

serviceDescription.title: 2. Service Description & Scope
serviceDescription.content: Aangelina AI is a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform that provides intelligent WhatsApp Business automation capabilities for businesses, with a primary focus on restaurants, retail establishments, and service providers in West African markets. The Platform offers the following core functionalities: (a) WhatsApp Status Automation: Automated scheduling, creation, and posting of WhatsApp Business status updates, including support for images, videos, text captions, and recurring posting schedules; (b) Business Management Tools: Product catalog management, customer contact organization, inventory tracking interfaces, and business profile configuration; (c) AI-Powered Customer Interactions: Automated response systems for customer inquiries, order processing, complaint handling, and general business communications (availability subject to subscription tier); (d) Analytics & Reporting: Usage statistics, posting history, engagement metrics, and performance dashboards; (e) Subscription Management: Self-service plan selection, token purchasing, billing management, and usage monitoring. The Platform integrates with WhatsApp Business through official API channels to deliver reliable automation. Service availability is subject to your subscription tier (Free, Popular, Pro, or Enterprise) and associated feature limitations. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any feature or functionality with reasonable notice, except where such changes would materially diminish the core value proposition of your paid subscription. Current functionality focuses on status management and business automation. Future features may include expanded conversational AI capabilities, which will be introduced with separate terms and explicit user consent requirements.

userObligations.title: 3. User Responsibilities & Acceptable Use
userObligations.content: By using the Platform, you agree to the following obligations and restrictions: (a) Account Security: You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials, including passwords and WhatsApp connection tokens. You must immediately notify us of any unauthorized access or security breach. You are liable for all activities conducted through your account; (b) Accurate Information: You must provide truthful, accurate, current, and complete information during registration and maintain the accuracy of such information throughout your use of the Platform. Misrepresentation may result in account suspension; (c) Business Use Only: The Platform is designed exclusively for WhatsApp Business accounts. Use with personal WhatsApp accounts is strictly prohibited and constitutes a material breach of these Terms; (d) Compliance with Laws: You must use the Platform in compliance with all applicable local, national, and international laws, regulations, and industry standards, including but not limited to data protection laws, consumer protection regulations, and telecommunications laws; (e) WhatsApp Policies: You must comply with WhatsApp's Terms of Service, Business Policy, and Commerce Policy. You acknowledge that violations of WhatsApp's policies may result in account restrictions or bans imposed by WhatsApp, for which we bear no responsibility; (f) Prohibited Activities: You must not: (i) use the Platform for spam, unsolicited marketing, or harassment; (ii) post illegal, defamatory, obscene, or infringing content; (iii) attempt to circumvent usage limits or access restrictions; (iv) reverse engineer, decompile, or extract source code from the Platform; (v) interfere with or disrupt Platform infrastructure or security measures; (vi) use automated tools to access the Platform except through official API integrations; (vii) resell or redistribute Platform access without authorization; (viii) impersonate others or misrepresent your affiliation; (g) Content Rights: You warrant that you own or have obtained all necessary rights, licenses, and permissions for any content you upload or post through the Platform, including images, videos, text, and trademarks. You are solely responsible for ensuring your content does not infringe third-party intellectual property rights; (h) Monitoring & Enforcement: We reserve the right to monitor Platform usage for compliance purposes and to investigate suspected violations. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these obligations without prior notice.

payment.title: 4. Subscription Plans, Pricing & Payment Terms
payment.content: Subscription fees are structured as follows and billed in West African CFA Francs (FCFA): (a) Plan Tiers: Free Plan (0 FCFA/month, 0 status posts, limited features); Popular Plan (2,000 FCFA/month, 15 status posts/month, standard features); Pro Plan (5,000 FCFA/month, unlimited status posts, premium features including advanced analytics and priority support). Enterprise plans with custom pricing are available upon request; (b) Billing Cycle: Subscriptions are billed monthly in advance on the anniversary date of your initial subscription. Your subscription automatically renews unless cancelled prior to the renewal date; (c) Payment Processing: All payments are processed securely through FedaPay, our certified payment partner. By subscribing, you authorize FedaPay to charge your designated payment method. We do not store complete payment card information on our servers; (d) Token System: Certain AI-powered features consume tokens. Each plan includes a monthly token allowance. Additional tokens may be purchased separately at prevailing rates. Tokens expire at the end of each billing cycle and do not roll over; (e) Plan Changes: You may upgrade your subscription at any time, with changes taking effect immediately and prorated charges applied. Downgrades take effect at the start of the next billing cycle. Unused status credits from higher tiers do not transfer to lower tiers; (f) Price Changes: We reserve the right to modify subscription pricing with 30 days' advance notice. Price changes do not affect active subscription periods but apply upon renewal. Continued use after price changes constitutes acceptance; (g) Taxes: Subscription fees exclude applicable taxes, duties, or governmental charges. You are responsible for all such amounts unless we are legally required to collect them; (h) Refund Policy: Refunds are provided at our discretion for service failures or billing errors. Subscription fees are generally non-refundable once the billing period has commenced. Refund requests must be submitted within 14 days of the charge; (i) Payment Failures: If payment fails, we will attempt to process payment using alternative methods on file. Continued payment failure may result in service suspension or account termination after reasonable notice; (j) Free Trial: Free trials, where offered, are limited to one per user/business. Trial terms are specified at signup and may be modified or discontinued at any time.

whatsappIntegration.title: 5. WhatsApp Business Integration & Authorization
whatsappIntegration.content: Use of the Platform requires integration with your WhatsApp Business account. By connecting your account, you grant us the following authorizations and acknowledge the associated terms: (a) Limited Authorization: You authorize Aangelina AI to access your WhatsApp Business account through official API channels for the sole purpose of posting scheduled status updates, verifying account connectivity, and monitoring posting success. This authorization is limited to the minimum permissions necessary to deliver the Service; (b) Account Requirements: You must use a valid WhatsApp Business account. Personal WhatsApp accounts are not supported and may result in service failures or account restrictions imposed by WhatsApp. You warrant that you have all necessary rights and permissions to connect the WhatsApp account to our Platform; (c) Data Access Limitations: We do not access, read, store, or process your private messages, group chats, customer conversations, or contact lists beyond what is strictly necessary for service operation. Our access is limited to status posting functionality and technical metadata; (d) Third-Party Platform: WhatsApp is operated by Meta Platforms, Inc., an independent third party. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Meta or WhatsApp. Your use of WhatsApp is governed by WhatsApp's separate terms and policies; (e) Service Dependencies: The Platform's functionality depends on WhatsApp's API availability and policies. Changes to WhatsApp's API, terms, or technical infrastructure may affect Platform features. We are not liable for service disruptions caused by WhatsApp; (f) Account Risks: Automated posting carries inherent risks, including potential account flagging, rate limiting, or suspension by WhatsApp. While we implement best practices to minimize these risks, we cannot guarantee that your WhatsApp account will not be restricted. You use automation features at your own risk; (g) Disconnection: You may disconnect your WhatsApp account at any time through your dashboard. Disconnection immediately revokes our access and terminates automated posting. Scheduled statuses will not be posted after disconnection; (h) Compliance: You remain solely responsible for ensuring your WhatsApp usage complies with WhatsApp's Business Policy, Commerce Policy, and Terms of Service. Violations may result in actions taken by WhatsApp independent of our Platform.

dataUsage.title: 6. Intellectual Property & Content Ownership
dataUsage.content: Intellectual property rights are allocated as follows: (a) Your Content: You retain all ownership rights to content you create, upload, or post through the Platform, including images, videos, text, product information, and business data ('User Content'). You do not transfer ownership of User Content to us; (b) Limited License to Us: By uploading User Content, you grant Aangelina AI a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, sublicensable license to use, reproduce, process, store, transmit, and display your User Content solely for the purpose of providing the Service, including posting statuses to your WhatsApp account, generating analytics, and maintaining backups. This license terminates when you delete the content or close your account, subject to reasonable retention periods; (c) Platform Ownership: The Platform, including all software, algorithms, user interfaces, designs, trademarks, logos, and documentation, is owned by Dev Merryck Studio and protected by intellectual property laws. These Terms do not grant you any ownership rights to the Platform; (d) Restricted License to You: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use the Platform solely for your internal business purposes in accordance with these Terms. You may not sublicense, sell, or redistribute Platform access; (e) Feedback: If you provide suggestions, ideas, or feedback about the Platform, you grant us an unrestricted, perpetual, irrevocable license to use such feedback for any purpose without compensation or attribution; (f) Trademark Usage: You may not use our trademarks, logos, or brand elements without prior written permission, except as necessary to identify your use of the Platform; (g) Copyright Infringement: We respect intellectual property rights. If you believe content on the Platform infringes your copyright, please contact us at legal@angelina-ai.com with detailed information. We will investigate and take appropriate action in accordance with applicable law; (h) Reservation of Rights: All rights not expressly granted in these Terms are reserved by Dev Merryck Studio.

liability.title: 7. Disclaimers, Limitations of Liability & Indemnification
liability.content: IMPORTANT LEGAL LIMITATIONS: (a) Service 'As Is': THE PLATFORM IS PROVIDED 'AS IS' AND 'AS AVAILABLE' WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, NON-INFRINGEMENT, OR COURSE OF PERFORMANCE. We do not warrant that the Platform will be uninterrupted, error-free, secure, or free from viruses or harmful components; (b) No Uptime Guarantee: While we strive for 99.9% uptime, we do not guarantee continuous, uninterrupted access to the Platform. Service may be temporarily unavailable due to maintenance, updates, or circumstances beyond our control; (c) Third-Party Dependencies: We are not responsible for failures, changes, or restrictions imposed by third-party services, including WhatsApp, payment processors, or infrastructure providers. Service disruptions caused by these parties are beyond our control; (d) WhatsApp Account Risks: WE ARE NOT LIABLE FOR ANY RESTRICTIONS, SUSPENSIONS, OR BANS IMPOSED ON YOUR WHATSAPP ACCOUNT BY META/WHATSAPP, REGARDLESS OF WHETHER SUCH ACTIONS RESULT FROM PLATFORM USE. You acknowledge that automation carries inherent risks; (e) Limitation of Liability: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, DEV MERRYCK STUDIO, ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR: (i) INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES; (ii) LOSS OF PROFITS, REVENUE, DATA, OR BUSINESS OPPORTUNITIES; (iii) BUSINESS INTERRUPTION OR REPUTATIONAL HARM; (iv) FAILED STATUS POSTS OR SCHEDULING ERRORS; (v) UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS TO YOUR ACCOUNT; (vi) DAMAGES EXCEEDING THE AMOUNT YOU PAID TO US IN THE 12 MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM. This limitation applies regardless of the legal theory (contract, tort, negligence, strict liability) and even if we were advised of the possibility of such damages; (f) Jurisdictional Variations: Some jurisdictions do not allow exclusion of implied warranties or limitation of liability for incidental or consequential damages. In such jurisdictions, our liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by law; (g) Indemnification: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Dev Merryck Studio, its affiliates, and their respective officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, or expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising from: (i) your use of the Platform; (ii) your violation of these Terms; (iii) your violation of third-party rights, including intellectual property or privacy rights; (iv) your User Content; (v) your violation of applicable laws or regulations. This indemnification obligation survives termination of these Terms.

termination.title: 8. Term, Termination & Account Closure
termination.content: These Terms remain in effect for as long as you access or use the Platform. Termination may occur as follows: (a) Termination by You: You may cancel your subscription and close your account at any time through your dashboard settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period. You will retain access to paid features until that date. No refunds are provided for partial billing periods except as specified in Section 4(h); (b) Termination by Us for Cause: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account immediately, without prior notice or refund, if: (i) you violate these Terms or our policies; (ii) you engage in fraudulent, illegal, or harmful activities; (iii) your payment method fails repeatedly; (iv) you violate WhatsApp's policies in a manner that jeopardizes our Platform; (v) we are required to do so by law or court order; (vi) your account remains inactive for an extended period (typically 12 months); (c) Termination by Us Without Cause: We may terminate your account for any reason with 30 days' advance notice. In such cases, we will provide a prorated refund for unused subscription time; (d) Effect of Termination: Upon termination: (i) your access to the Platform ceases immediately; (ii) scheduled status posts will not be executed; (iii) your WhatsApp connection is automatically disconnected; (iv) we initiate data deletion procedures as described in our Privacy Policy; (v) all licenses granted to you under these Terms terminate; (vi) you remain liable for any outstanding fees or obligations incurred prior to termination; (e) Data Retrieval: You have 30 days following termination to export your data through available tools. After this grace period, data is permanently deleted and cannot be recovered; (f) Survival: Sections of these Terms that by their nature should survive termination will remain in effect, including intellectual property provisions, disclaimers, limitations of liability, indemnification obligations, and dispute resolution procedures; (g) No Liability for Termination: We are not liable to you or any third party for termination of your account or access to the Platform, except as expressly provided in these Terms.

contact.title: 9. General Provisions & Contact Information
contact.content: Additional terms governing your use of the Platform: (a) Modifications to Terms: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email and/or prominent Platform notice at least 30 days before taking effect. Continued use after changes become effective constitutes acceptance. If you disagree with modifications, you must discontinue use and may cancel your subscription; (b) Governing Law: These Terms are governed by the laws of [Applicable Jurisdiction], without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of [Applicable Jurisdiction], and you consent to personal jurisdiction therein; (c) Dispute Resolution: Before initiating formal legal proceedings, you agree to attempt good-faith resolution by contacting legal@angelina-ai.com. We will work to resolve disputes amicably within 30 days; (d) Severability: If any provision of these Terms is found invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions continue in full force and effect, and the invalid provision shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it enforceable; (e) Entire Agreement: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and any supplemental terms, constitute the entire agreement between you and Dev Merryck Studio regarding the Platform and supersede all prior agreements or understandings; (f) No Waiver: Our failure to enforce any provision of these Terms does not constitute a waiver of that provision or our right to enforce it in the future; (g) Assignment: You may not assign or transfer these Terms or your account without our prior written consent. We may assign these Terms to any affiliate or successor entity; (h) Force Majeure: We are not liable for delays or failures in performance resulting from circumstances beyond our reasonable control, including natural disasters, war, terrorism, labor disputes, or internet infrastructure failures; (i) Language: These Terms are drafted in English and French. In case of discrepancies, the English version prevails; (j) Contact Information: For questions, support, or legal inquiries: General Support: support@angelina-ai.com; Privacy Matters: privacy@angelina-ai.com; Legal/Terms: legal@angelina-ai.com; Business Address: Dev Merryck Studio, [Complete Business Address]. We will respond to inquiries within 48 hours for general matters and 30 days for formal legal requests. By using Aangelina AI, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
